message: ### Implementation Complete #### Files Changed - `lib/ypi-studio-types.ts` — added Studio session-link/widget/live overlay types. - `lib/ypi-studio-session-link.ts` — added high-confidence session → Studio task resolver and lightweight projection builder. - `lib/ypi-studio-tasks.ts` — exported read-only runtime context helper. - `lib/ypi-studio-transcripts.ts` — added bounded transcript preview helper. - `app/api/sessions/[id]/studio-task/route.ts` — added session-scoped Studio task API. - `components/YpiStudioSessionWidget.tsx` — added desktop/mobile floating progress widget. - `components/AppShell.tsx` — integrated fetching, polling, live overlays, and Studio drawer focus. - `components/ChatWindow.tsx` — reports compact Studio tool progress overlays. - `components/YpiStudioPanel.tsx` — supports focused task highlighting/scope switching/refresh. - `app/globals.css` — added flow/pulse animation CSS with reduced-motion handling. - `docs/modules/api.md`, `docs/modules/frontend.md`, `doc…
